description: Six retained prompt baselines, nineteen evolved or failure-targeted general prompts, and five new search styles share two fresh 12-case blocks.

strategies.name: Retained and Improved Prompt Lenses
strategies.description: Six retained Cycle 1 lenses plus nine improved and hybrid prompt lenses.

stages.instruction: Solve independently. Compare plausible global rules, test a late visible suffix when practical, and return the most predictive compact continuation.

strategies.name: Failure-Targeted and Novel Prompt Lenses
strategies.description: Ten general structural prompts aimed at missing hypotheses plus five new internal search styles.

stages.instruction: Solve independently. Compare plausible global rules, test a late visible suffix when practical, and return the most predictive compact continuation.
